items.title: Zendaya’s Earrings Are Part of a Much Bigger Problem
items.summary: The 3,000-year-old Iranian discs turned red-carpet jewelry are emblematic of a market that has spent decades quietly dismantling ancient objects for parts.

items.title: Required Reading
items.summary: This week: Chitra Ganesh’s futuristic myths, André Breton and optimism, the mermaids of Florida, a Palestinian digital archive, Argentina and racism, and more.
